data.title: Bitcoin’s dip leads traders to XLM, LTC, ETC, BNB as altcoin season potential spins attention.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently testing key support levels as the possibility of an altcoin season looms, capturing the attention of traders. Amidst this trend, XLM, LTC, ETC, and BNB are emerging as top choices for investors seeking alternative opportunities.
VENEZUELA WILL ALLOW "ALTERNATIVE" DETENTION MEASURES FOR A GROUP OF VENEZUELAN CITIZENS, GOV'T SAYS

data.title: Ultragenyx granted 45,292 restricted stock units to 29 new non-executive officers as an inducement to join on July 16, 2025.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Novato, California, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) disclosed the issuance of 45,292 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to 29 recently recruited non-executive officers. The allotments were sanctioned by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors and distributed under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on July 16, 2025. This move served as a notable inducement for the new employees joining Ultragenyx as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. closes $900M offering of 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032, issued at par.
data.description: In Atlanta on July 18, 2025, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) disclosed the successful closure of their recent offering. The company completed the issuance of $900 million in total principal of 9.625% senior secured second lien notes due 2032, known as the "Notes," which were sold at face value.

data.title: Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN) faces delisting from Nasdaq for non-compliance with listing requirements.
data.description: On July 15, 2025, Bowen Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: BOWN), a special purpose acquisition company based in New York, received a Delisting Determination Letter. This letter stated that BOWN's securities face delisting from the Nasdaq Global Market.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable plans to invest $1 billion to raise stake to 38% in Isagen S.A. E.S.P.
data.description: In recent news from Brookfield on July 18, 2025, it was disclosed that Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP, BEPC; TSX: BEP.UN, BEPC) plans to boost its equity stake in Isagen S.A. E.S.P. by investing a significant $1 billion. This move will see Brookfield Renewable's ownership in Isagen rise to around 38%, showcasing a notable commitment to the energy sector.

data.title: Robot Consulting Co., Ltd. closes $15 million IPO on Nasdaq, offering 3,750,000 ADSs at $4 each, trading under "LAWR".
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Tokyo, Japan, Robot Consulting Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LAWR), a Japanese company focusing on human resource solutions and intending to expand into legal technology and the metaverse, successfully closed its initial public offering. The offering consisted of 3,750,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) priced at US$4 per ADS. Each ADS represents one ordinary share of the company. The ADSs commenced trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on July 17, 2025, under the symbol “LAWR.”

data.title: Delek US Holdings to host Q2 2025 earnings call on August 6, 2025. Results to be released before market opens. Call at 10:00 a.m. CT. Website for live broadcast: www.DelekUS.com.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, will release its second quarter 2025 financial results before the U.S. stock market opens on August 6, 2025. The company plans to issue a press release on that day. A conference call is set to take place at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) on the same day to discuss these results. The call will be live-streamed on Delek US's website at www.DelekUS.com. Stay tuned for further updates on the company's performance.

data.title: Gray Media, Inc. raises Revolving Credit Facility to $750 million and extends maturity to 2028.
data.description: Today, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) based in Atlanta, disclosed that it has raised the total commitments for its Revolving Credit Facility by $50 million, bringing the total commitments to $750 million. Additionally, they have prolonged the maturity date from December 1, 2027, to December 1, 2028.

data.title: Radiate Holdco, LLC released its full year 2024 financial results on July 18, 2025, compliant with Indentures governing FLFO.
data.description: Radiate Holdco, LLC ("Radiate") from Princeton, N.J., disclosed its complete financial outcomes for the fiscal year 2024 through its secure investor portal on July 18, 2025. The results adhere to the terms outlined in the Indentures overseeing Radiate's FLFO.

data.title: Delek Logistics Partners, LP to report Q2 2025 results on August 6, 2025, with conference call at 11:30 a.m. CT. #NYSE #DKL
data.description: BRENTWOOD, Tenn.-- Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) announced plans to release a summary of their second quarter 2025 results before the U.S. stock market opens on Wednesday, August 6, 2025. They scheduled a conference call to discuss the results at 11:30 a.m. CT (12:30 p.m. ET) on the same day. The conference call will be live-streamed on www.DelekLogistics.com.

data.title: Bitcoin's dominance in the market drops to 61% while Ethereum and XRP gain ground, down from 65.5% a week ago.
data.description: On Friday, the leading digital asset represented 61% of the total value of the cryptocurrency market, showing a decrease from 65.5% the previous week.

data.title: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) to discuss Q2 2025 results in conference call on July 25, released after market on July 24.
data.description: Comfort Systems USA, Inc., a prominent mechanical and electrical contracting services provider, has set its quarterly conference call and webcast for Friday, July 25, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time to review the financial performance in the second quarter of 2025. The company's stock trades on NYSE under the symbol FIX. The financial results for the said quarter will be disclosed after the market closes on Thursday, July 24, 2025. The discussion will cover various services offered by Comfort Systems USA, such as heating, ventilation, air conditioning, plumbing, electrical, piping, and controls.

data.title: Mesa Royalty Trust income distribution in July 2025 is $0.02748 per unit, total $80,962 from San Juan Basin properties.
data.description: Houston-based Mesa Royalty Trust (NYSE: MTR) revealed the income distribution for July 2025, with unitholders recorded on July 31 set to receive $0.027480528 per unit on October 31. The Trust obtained $80,962 solely from its San Juan Basin properties in New Mexico, managed by Hilcorp San Juan LP, an affiliate of Hilcorp Energy Company. Notably, no income was generated in July 2025.

data.title: Perdoceo Education Corp set Q2 earnings call on July 31 in Schaumburg, IL.
data.description: Perdoceo Education Corporation, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, has set a date for its second quarter earnings conference call on July 31st. The call will provide insights into the company's financial performance during the quarter, including key figures and strategic updates. The conference call is expected to attract investors, analysts, and other stakeholders interested in the corporation's progress and projections. It is a significant event for the corporation as it offers transparency and communication regarding its financial health and future outlook.

data.title: Midas Immersion Cooling introduces full maintenance suite for liquid-immersion data centers in Austin, TX; includes Cordless Server Lift and XCI Byte Bath to streamline operations.
data.description: Midas Immersion Cooling, based in Austin, Texas, introduced a new Maintenance Suite on July 18, 2025, tailored for full immersion data centers. The suite includes a Cordless Server Lift and XCI Byte Bath to enhance wear-free operations. This all-in-one solution aims to streamline maintenance processes in data centers.

data.title: Permianville Royalty Trust reports net profits interest calculation for July 2025 based on oil and gas production in April and March 2025, with incurred costs in May 2025.
data.description: The Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) based in Houston reported the net profits interest calculation for July 2025. This calculation is determined by the reported oil production in April 2025 and reported natural gas production in March 2025, along with accrued costs incurred in May 2025. The trust noted increased capital expenditures in the current month, impacting the calculation due to timing variations that are not consistently spread out.

data.title: HPQ Silicon cancels 5.3M stock options with $1.00 exercise price set to expire in 2026; none had been exercised.
data.description: HPQ Silicon Inc. has recently disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned the termination of 5,335,000 stock options. Expected to expire on December 20, 2026, these options had an exercise price of $1.00 each. None of the options from this particular series had been utilized up to this point. HPQ Silicon Inc., recognized as a technology frontrunner focusing on innovation within advanced materials and critical process development, is listed on the TSX-V under the ticker symbol HPQ, on the OTCQB as HPQFF, and on the FRA as O08. This decision marks an important development for the company in the realm of stock options management.

data.title: Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) declares Q3 dividend of $0.2725 per common share, payable on Sep 30, 2025 to shareholders.
data.description: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) has revealed that its board of directors approved a third quarter cash dividend of $0.2725 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on September 30, 2025, to shareholders on record as of September 16, 2025. Additionally, the board, acting as the general partner of Rayonier, L.P., announced a third quarter cash distribution of $0.2725 per share to be paid out.

data.title: Rogers Communications announces pricing to purchase up to $1.25 billion of U.S. Dollar Debt Securities in cash tender offers.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Rogers Communications Inc. announced the pricing terms of its Offers to buy back outstanding notes with a maximum aggregate Total Consideration of US$1,250,000,000. The Offers include various series of Notes listed in a table, with acceptance priority levels determining the series to be purchased. If a series of Notes is accepted, all validly tendered and non-withdrawn Notes of that series will be bought back without proration. Rogers is listed on the TSX (RCI.A and RCI.B) and NYSE (RCI).
